kuppingercole.title: Overall Leader in PAM
kuppingercole.body: Krontech was evaluated as an Overall Leader in the KuppingerCole Leadership Compass Privileged Access Management report. This evaluation is based on product strength, market presence, and innovation criteria.

whyKron.title: Why Kron?
whyKron.subtitle: Your trusted partner in cybersecurity
whyKron.reason1Body: Cybersecurity solutions developed with Turkey-based R&D, domestic and national.
whyKron.reason2Body: Trusted cybersecurity solutions across 6 continents, 35+ countries, and 1500+ projects.
whyKron.reason3Body: 24/7 technical support and certified expert team at your service.
whyKron.reason4Body: Products recognized by KuppingerCole, Gartner, and other independent analysts.

video.title: Anadolu Efes Success Story
video.body: How did Anadolu Efes ensure access security for its critical systems with Krontech PAM solution?
